channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rodgers says allegations that he played a role in Saleh's firing as Jets coach are 'patently false'
item.description: Aaron Rodgers insisted he played no role in the firing of Robert Saleh as the New York Jets coach and called such allegations “patently false.”.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bucs' 3-word message as Hurricane Milton set to devastate Florida
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers offered a three-word message to Florida residents as Hurricane Milton is set to devastate the state's western coast line.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MLB Playoffs pitching: Tigers open Game 3 of ALDS with Montero, Guardians go with Bibee in Game 4
item.description: The Detroit Tigers plan to put right-hander Keider Montero on the mound against the Cleveland Guardians in Game 3 of their AL Division Series on Wednesday, when one team will earn an edge in the best-of-five series.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: 2 teams suing NASCAR ask court to allow them to compete under new charter agreement as case proceeds
item.description: The two teams suing NASCAR have asked for a court order to compete under the 2025 charter agreement as their antitrust case moves through federal court.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Giants star calls out NFL over apparent double standard on violent gesture penalties: ‘Cool when they do it’
item.description: New York Giants wide receiver Darius Slayton called out the NFL over an apparent double standard when it comes to calling penalties for violent gestures during games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Robert Saleh breaks silence after Jets firing
item.description: Former New York Jets head coach Robert Saleh broke his silence on Wednesday after he was fired by the team five games into the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jeff Ulbrich was a gritty player, a respected assistant and now takes over a struggling Jets team
item.description: Jeff Ulbrich was in the middle of putting together the game plan for the New York Jets' defense when he got the news that stunned him — and the rest of the NFL. Robert Saleh was out as the head coach. And Ulbrich was taking over for the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How to watch 49ers vs. Seahawks on Thursday Night Football
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers square off against division rivals the Seattle Seahawks at 5:15 p.m. PDT on Thursday, Oct. 10.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Pete Alonso's power surge helps propel Mets to NLDS Game 3 win over Phillies
item.description: Pete Alonso helped the New York Mets to a 7-2 victory thanks to his home run that gave the team some comfort room against the Philadelphia Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jets firing Robert Saleh could be 'way to shift blame' from Aaron Rodgers, Michele Tafoya says
item.description: Michelle Tafoya said the Jets firing head coach Robert Saleh could be a "way to shift blame" from Aaron Rodgers during her appearance on OutKick's "Don't @ Me With Dan Dakich.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets owner says firing of Saleh will bring 'new energy' to one of franchise's 'most talented teams'
item.description: Woody Johnson sensed his struggling New York Jets needed a change — and now. So the owner made the stunning decision Tuesday to fire coach Robert Saleh just five games into his fourth season after the team's 2-3 start following a 23-17 loss to Minnesota in London on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jerry Jones and Roger Penske partner to give IndyCar a brand new street racing spectacle
item.description: When IndyCar approached the Dallas Cowboys about potentially hosting a street course race in Texas, Jerry Jones saw that Roger Penske was involved and had no hesitation in striking a deal.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Rockies bringing back the franchise's all-time winningest manager Bud Black for the 2025 season
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The Colorado Rockies announced Tuesday they are bringing back Bud Black, the franchise's all-time winningest manager, for another season on the heels of a sixth straight losing campaign. The Rockies extended Black through 2025.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SEC, Big Ten leaders mulling future of fast-changing college sports
item.description: The Big Ten and SEC already have the upper hand in college football. At meetings this week, their leaders are setting the stage to exact even more control over the sport's future.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Ten has become a landing zone for transfer quarterbacks
item.description: PISCATAWAY, N.J. (AP) — Bret Bielema was at the forefront of the graduate transfer game in 2011 when the NCAA passed a new rule that allowed athletes in all sports to transfer and gain immediate eligibility without a waiver as long as they were enrolled in graduate school.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego Padres urge fans to 'stay classy'
item.description: San Diego Padres management is asking fans to demonstrate good behavior as the contentious National League Division Series shifts from Dodger Stadium to Petco Park on Tuesday, tied at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Taylor Swift is back to watch Travis Kelce and the Chiefs with Eras Tour soon to resume
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Taylor Swift was back at Arrowhead Stadium on Monday night to see her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the Kansas City Chiefs play the New Orleans Saints after the pop superstar had missed the team's previous two games on the road.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Lane Thomas hits 3-run homer, Cleveland's bullpen torments Tigers as Guardians win ALDS opener 7-0
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lane Thomas hit a three-run homer in a five-run outburst before Detroit got an out, and the Cleveland Guardians unleashed their lights-out bullpen to complete a four-hitter in a 7-0 win over the Tigers in an AL Division Series opener on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mets use another October rally to score 5 runs in 8th and top Phillies 6-2 in Game 1 of NLDS
item.description: Mark Vientos and Brandon Nimmo keyed another late New York comeback, helping the Mets break through for five runs in the eighth inning against a pair of All-Star relievers as they rallied past the Philadelphia Phillies 6-2 on Saturday in Game 1 of their National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Here's where SoFi ranks among NFL's best (and worst) stadiums
item.description: SoFi Stadium in Inglewood is not the best stadium in the NFL but it did crack the top five, according to a survey released Thursday. Lumen Field, the home of the Seattle Seahawks, was named the best stadium for football fans to visit in USA Today's rankings of all NFL stadiums.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5
